mapper.insert: INSERT INTO venue_stage_section (config_id, section_id, is_active, custom_rows, custom_seats_per_row) VALUES (#{configId}, #{sectionId}, #{active}, #{customRows}, #{customSeatsPerRow})

INSERT INTO venue_stage_section (config_id, section_id, is_active, custom_rows, custom_seats_per_row) VALUES (#{configId}, #{sectionId}, #{active}, #{customRows}, #{customSeatsPerRow}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_active = VALUES(is_active), custom_rows = VALUES(custom_rows), custom_seats_per_row = VALUES(custom_seats_per_row)
mapper.select: SELECT vss.*, vs.section_name, vs.section_type, vs.total_rows, vs.seats_per_row FROM venue_stage_section vss JOIN venue_section vs ON vss.section_id = vs.section_id WHERE vss.config_id = #{configId} ORDER BY vs.display_order
